steps.title: Decompose the function into components
steps.content:
The function $W(x) = 3x + 45$ represents the sum of two time components:
  • $3x$ — time to water $x$ shrubs at 3 minutes per shrub
  • 45 — a fixed time that does not depend on $x$

steps.title: Identify the fixed time as mowing time
steps.content:
The 45-minute component must be the mowing time because it is constant regardless of the number of shrubs to water. Algebraically, when $x = 0$:
$W(0) = 3(0) + 45 = 45$
The gardener takes 45 minutes to mow the grass.
